title: Fix separability matrix for nested CompoundModels
description:
Fix the separability matrix returned by astropy.modeling.separable.separability_matrix when a CompoundModel contains another CompoundModel built with `&`.

Implementation:
- In astropy/modeling/separable.py, update _cstack so the right-hand ndarray branch copies the sub-matrix `right` into the bottom-right block instead of filling it with 1s.
- Add regression tests to astropy/modeling/tests/test_separable.py covering the issue reproducer, compound models on both sides of `&`, compound on the left, deeper nesting, nested `&` followed by `|`, and a custom model with _calculate_separability_matrix inside a compound.
- Add a changelog entry in the modeling bug-fix section.
- Run pytest astropy/modeling/tests/test_separable.py and pytest astropy/modeling/tests/test_models.py::test_custom_separability_matrix.
